text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If I take into consideration today's weather, wind
speed, and humidity... Yes, this should work.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to keep you waiting. I've made some
revisions to my calculations.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The more refined a theory, the simpler it
becomes. Keep your eyes on me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you the ultimate result of my
calculations—total victory!
